description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible perforations along the barrel shroud for cooling. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted vertically below the receiver. The trigger guard and trigger are both metallic, and the bolt handle is visible on the right side of the receiver. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel, and the muzzle end is plain with no visible device attached. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, robust firearm suitable for urban or civilian use.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, long blued barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, with the wooden stock and magazine barely visible.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock, metal receiver, barrel, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the barrel's perforations, iron sights, and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the wooden stock, metal receiver, barrel, and the magazine, mirroring the right side but with less detail on the bolt handle.
